Removed_Other.purpose: Improves performance and reduces lag when rendering complex models.

Added_Other.name: FFlagFoundationDialogOversizedBackdrop_Staged
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the backdrop size for dialog boxes in the UI.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances visual clarity and focus on dialog content for players.

Added_Other.name: FFlagFoundationOverlayLuaAppInsetsFix2_Staged
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the layout of app overlays to account for screen insets.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves the visual appearance of overlays on different devices.

Added_Other.name: FFlagFoundationPopoverOversizedBackdrop_Staged
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the backdrop size for popover menus.
Added_Other.purpose: Provides a better visual experience when interacting with popover menus.

Added_Other.name: FFlagFoundationPopoverRootZIndex_Staged
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the stacking order of popover elements in the UI.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures that popovers appear above other UI elements for better visibility.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Allows dynamic retrieval of version information from the code repository.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures players are using the latest features and fixes by providing up-to-date versioning.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Changes how dynamic strings with timestamps are handled in the system.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures more accurate and timely updates of dynamic text in games, enhancing player communication and information display.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Improves how version control information is stored and accessed.
Changed_Other.purpose: Allows developers to quickly access the latest updates and changes.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes string handling by using a faster method for timestamp processing.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves game performance by reducing lag when displaying time-related strings.
